_note: Refreshed by the refresh-sports-feed scheduled task. Each item is {headline, url, source, published (ISO8601), snark}. Snark voice: Barstool-adjacent guy-at-the-bar, crass, horny, cocky, zero filler. One sentence. No slurs, no punching down at specific real people in a harmful way. Punch sideways (at media, front offices, rival fanbases) and up (at ownership). Keep it Boston.

items.headline: Willson Contreras' two-run HR lifts Red Sox past Braves 3-2
items.snark: Sox went 0-for-9 with RISP before Contreras bailed them out in the eighth, which is basically this offense in a nutshell.

items.headline: Aroldis Chapman sparks trade speculation after hugging teammates on camera
items.snark: Chapman hugged everyone in the bullpen and Red Sox Twitter panicked like he was saying goodbye before the trade deadline in May.

items.headline: Trevor Story to IL with groin issue, Nick Sogard called up from Worcester
items.snark: Story's on the IL again, shocking literally no one who's watched this $140M paperweight play 52% of games since signing.

items.headline: Danny Coulombe makes rehab appearance, could return soon from IL
items.snark: 36-year-old lefty threw nine pitches in Portland, which officially makes him healthier than Trevor Story.

items.headline: Aaron Rodgers back on Patriots schedule after re-signing with Steelers
items.snark: Rodgers re-signed with Pittsburgh so Pats get another crack at him in Week 2, someone check his ayahuasca schedule first.

items.headline: Scouting report: What Dre'Mont Jones brings to Patriots edge rotation in 2026
items.snark: Jones signed a 3-year, $36.5M deal and has never made the playoffs in seven years, Vrabel's building a redemption tour roster.
